title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Punjab National Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Punjab National Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
